name: ls
description: List directory contents, displaying files and subdirectories with optional detail formatting

options.label: Show all
options.description: Include hidden files and directories (those starting with a dot)

options.label: Long format
options.description: Display detailed information including permissions, owner, size, and modification date

options.label: Human-readable sizes
options.description: Print file sizes in human-readable format (e.g., 1K, 234M, 2G)

options.label: Recursive
options.description: List subdirectories and their contents recursively

options.label: Sort by
options.description: Sort output by the specified field

choices.label: Size
choices.description: Sort by file size, largest first

choices.label: Time
choices.description: Sort by modification time, newest first

choices.label: None
choices.description: Do not sort; list entries in directory order

options.label: Reverse
options.description: Reverse the order of the sort

options.label: Colorize output
options.description: Control whether to colorize the output

choices.label: Auto
choices.description: Colorize only when output is a terminal

positionalArgs.label: Path
positionalArgs.description: Directory or file paths to list

examples.label: List all files in long format with human-readable sizes
List files sorted by time in reverse order
List all files sorted by size (largest first)
List only top-level contents with color output
